title.description: Short title summarizing the issue (keep under 80 chars)

body.description: Detailed explanation of the issue with suggested fix

confidence_score.description: How confident the reviewer is that this is a real issue (0-1)

path.description: Relative file path from repo root

start_line.description: Starting line number of the issue

end_line.description: Ending line number of the issue

status.description: Whether this is a new finding or one persisting from a prior review. Use 'new' for initial reviews.

source.description: v2: which reviewer produced this finding. Chunk reviewers set 'codex' or 'claude'; deterministic floor sets 'deterministic'.

verifier_verdict.description: v2: cross-family verifier verdict. Chunk reviewers MUST set 'n/a' (placeholder); the cross-family verifier overwrites this downstream.

agreement.description: v2: agreement label. Chunk reviewers MUST set 'codex-only' or 'claude-only' matching their source (placeholder); the merge step overwrites to 'both' when both families flag the same issue.

suggested_fix.description: v2 P5: 1–3 sentence fix recommendation. Required in v2 synthesis output. Full code only when the change is < 5 lines.

original_confidence_score.description: v2 post-fix: pre-penalty confidence score from the originating chunk reviewer. Set by the cross-family verifier merge so the threshold filter can use the un-penalized value while the displayed confidence_score still reflects the inconclusive penalty. Chunk reviewers MUST emit null; review.sh populates it downstream. May be null in v1 outputs flowing through the v2 path.

overall_correctness.description: v2 verdict. Mapping rule: any priority-3 confirmed (or deterministic) finding → blocking; any priority-2 confirmed → needs-changes; otherwise correct. Use 'insufficient information' only when synthesis cannot compute a verdict (e.g., all chunks failed).

overall_explanation.description: Brief explanation of the overall verdict

review_iteration.description: Which review iteration this is (1 = initial, 2+ = follow-up)

resolved_prior_findings.description: Titles of prior review findings that have been resolved. Empty array for initial reviews.

iteration_meta.description: v2: metadata about the iteration (mode, prior_sha, delta block). Chunk reviewers MUST emit null; review.sh and the synthesizer populate it downstream.

prior_sha.description: SHA of the head commit at the prior review, if known.

delta.description: v2 P5: top-level delta block for follow-up runs. Mirrors iteration_meta.delta when populated. Chunk reviewers MUST emit null. Each array holds finding titles (strings).
